title: Changelogs
description: Released changes for publicly available interfaces and apps.

new.description: Added **Create Gift Card API** for creating gift cards with monetary value (FUND) or usage-based limits (ENTITLEMENT).
Added **Get All Gift Cards API** for retrieving paginated list of gift cards with filtering by type and status.
Added **Get Gift Card Details API** for retrieving detailed gift card information including customer details and transaction history.
Added **Get Gift Card Transactions API** for retrieving paginated transaction history with filtering by transaction type (ISSUED, CREDIT, DEBIT).

updates.description: Updated **Activate Payment Method API** to support unified payment method registration in a single request.

new.description: Added comprehensive **Product Catalogue API** with 17 endpoints for complete product catalog management including AI-powered features.
Added **Create Product Catalog API** for creating product catalogs under stores.
Added **Fetch Product Catalogs API** for retrieving all catalogs under a store.
Added **Create Product API**, **Update Product API**, and **Fetch Product by Id API** for complete product management.
Added **Add Variant For Product API**, **Update Variant API**, and **Update Variant Inventory API** for product variant management.
Added **Generate Product Description API** for AI-powered product description generation based on product name and language preferences.
Added **Generate Product Images API** for AI-powered product image generation with custom prompts and specifications.
Added **Generate Product Catalog from Images API** for extracting structured product information from menu images or catalog photos using AI.
targetLink: Generate Product Catalog from Images API

new.description: Added **Create Service Provider API** for creating new service provider applications with company information.
Added **Fetch Service Provider for Partner API** and **Fetch Service Provider for Merchant API** for retrieving service provider information.
targetLink: Fetch Service Provider for Partner API
Fetch Service Provider for Merchant API

new.description: Added **Get All Service Provider Applications API** with filtering support for ONBOARDING and RENEWAL application types.
targetLink: Get All Service Provider Applications API

new.description: Added **Fetch Service Provider Application Status API** for retrieving application status and onboarding progress.
targetLink: Fetch Service Provider Application Status API

new.description: Added **Get Device Registration Code API** for generating registration codes and deep links for device onboarding.
Added **Generate Branding Options API** to create AI-powered branding themes and color schemes based on website URLs.
Added **Create Merchant Account API** for creating new merchant accounts with email and role assignment.
Added **Create Partner Account API** for creating new partner accounts with email and role assignment.
Added **Subscribe to Merchant Reports API** for configuring automated merchant event reports via SFTP.
Added **Subscribe to Partner Reports API** for configuring automated partner event reports via SFTP.
New Activate Payment Method API to activate available payment methods (AMEX, SWISH, KLARNA, VIPPS, MOBILEPAY, ACCTOACC) for a merchant.
Added new **Get Payment by ID API** to the **Payments APIs**.

updates.description: Renamed the request parameter `pfMerchantId` to `acquirerMID` in **Create Merchant API** .
Support for `pfMerchantId` will be continued for the time being, but we recommend transitioning to `acquirerMID` for future-proof compatibility.
Updated the type of request parameter `address` from string to object in the **Fetch All Merchants API** and **Fetch Merchant Details API**.

logs.title: New APIs and request parameter updates.

new.description: Added **Set Terminal Config API**, **Set Merchant Terminal Config API**, **Set Store Terminal Config API** APIs to the **Terminals APIs**.

updates.description: Removed the `merchantType` response parameter from the **Fetch All Merchants API**.
Added `merchantLanguage` and `mccCode` response parameters to the **Fetch All Merchants API**.

logs.title: New language support and various performance improvements.

new.description: Added language support for **Finnish** and **Danish**.
Added power modes to improve performance when the battery is charged and there is an external power source connected.
Added visual event using LEDs when configuration is changed.

updates.description: Made changes to the status bar immediately visible.
Added `rrn` response parameter to the **Fetch All Transactions API**.

new.description: Added user guide for **SurfPad**.

updates.description: Added `transactionId` response parameter to the **Check Payment Status API**.
`transactionId` will be returned when the payment status is ‘PAYMENT_COMPLETED’.
Added new response parameters `totalNumberOfTransaction`, `totalAmountOfTransaction`, `lastTransactionAt`, `phoneNumber`, and `acquirerMID` to the **Fetch Merchant Details API**.

new.description: Added **Reboot Terminal API** to the **Terminals APIs**.
Added support for using **Terminal name**(`terminalName`) to identify individual terminals.

updates.description: Added new optional request parameter `terminalName` to the **Register Terminal API**.
Added new response parameter `terminalName` to the **Fetch All Merchant Terminals API**.
Added new response parameter `terminalName` to the **Fetch All Store Terminals API**.

new.description: Added support for **partial payments** in **Payments APIs**.
Added new **Update Terminal Name API** for updating terminal name.
**Logistics APIs** are now available.

updates.description: Added optional parameter `amount` for partial payments in **Initiate a Payment API**.
Added new order status(`orderStatus`)value `PARTIAL_PAYMENT_COMPLETED` in **Fetch Order Status API**.

logs.title: Support for pre-entered information in KYB

new.description: Added support for pre-entered information to simplify the KYB process for merchants.
This allows partners to pre-enter opening information, gift cards, prepayments, and funds information fields in the KYB.

updates.description: Updated **Create Merchant API** to support optional object parameter `preEnteredInformation` in the control fields.
Partners can use this parameter to pre-enter `openingInfo` , `giftcards` , `prePayments` , and `fundsInfo`.

logs.title: Request parameter updates in Logistics APIs.

updates.description: Email address ( `email` )  is now mandatory for creating a shipment order using **Create Shipment API**.

new.description: Added new **Fetch Transactions by ID API** in **Transactions APIs**.
You can use the **Fetch Transactions by ID API** to retrieve a list of all transactions associated with an order.
This is useful in cases where a single order was paid through multiple **partial payments**.
Added support for new terminal configurations at **merchant**, **store**, and **terminal level** in **Terminals APIs**
Tap before amount ( `tapBeforeAmount` ) : Configure card tapping before amount is displayed.
Power mode ( `powerMode` ) : Configure performance modes for terminals.
Status bar background color ( `statusBarBackground` ) : Configure status bar background color.
Status bar foreground color ( `statusBarForeground` ) : Configure status bar background color.
Status bar battery low icon color ( `statusBarBatteryLow` ) : Configure custom color for the status bar battery icon when the battery level drops to 20% or lower.

logs.title: Response parameter updates in Fetch All Transactions API.

updates.description: Added settlement data to **Fetch All Transactions API**.
Settlement data includes, settlement status ( `settlementStatus` ), payout ( `payout` ), and fee ( `fee` ).

logs.title: Support for querying in Transaction APIs.

new.description: You can now use queries in the **Fetch All Transactions API** to retrieve all transaction within a particular date range.
Specify the start and end dates in the `startDate` and `endDate` parameters to retrieve all transactions within that date range.

logs.title: Response parameter updates in Transaction APIs.

updates.description: Added  `cardBrand` field to the response parameters of the **Fetch One Transaction API** and **Fetch Transactions by ID API**.
This field returns the card brand used for the transaction such as Visa, Mastercard, or Amex.

new.description: Added new **Fetch All Multi-Merchant Groups API** to **Merchants APIs**.
You can use this API to retrieve a list of all multi-merchant groups associated with a specific partner.

logs.title: Response parameter updates in Merchants, Stores, and Transactions APIs.

updates.description: Added `terminalType` and `osType` fields to the response parameters of the **Fetch All Merchant Terminals API** and **Fetch All Store Terminals API**.
The `terminalType` field returns the type of the terminal.
The `osType` field returns the type of operating system running on the terminal.
Added `storeId` field to the response parameters of the **Fetch All Transactions API**.

logs.title: Response parameter updates in Transaction APIs.

updates.description: Added  `paymentId` and `rrn` field to the response parameters of the **Fetch One Transaction API** and **Fetch Transactions by ID API**.
These fields return the unique payment ID of the transaction and the Retrieval Reference Number(RRN) of the transaction respectively.

new.description: Added new **Fetch All Merchant Contracts API** to **Merchants APIs**.
You can use this API to retrieve a list of all contracts associated with the merchant.

logs.title: Response parameter update in Transaction API.

updates.description: Added  `paymentId` field to the response parameters of the **Fetch All Transactions API**
This field returns the unique payment ID of the transaction.

new.description: Added new **Add Receipt Information API** to **Orders APIs**.
You can use this API to store cash register details for receipts.
Added new **Fetch APN List API** to **Terminal APIs**.
You can use this API to fetch APN list for an active terminal.
Added new **Email Receipt API** to **Transaction APIs**.
You can use this API to email receipts to users.

logs.title: Response parameter updates in Transaction and Payment API's.

updates.description: Added  `voided` flag to response parameters of the **Fetch Transactions by ID API**, **Fetch All Transactions API**, **Fetch One Transaction API** and **Get Payment by ID API**.
The voided flag denotes if the transaction has been voided or not.

new.description: Added new **Adjustments API** and **Tips API**.
Adjustments API takes care of handling additional amounts to orders like tips, surcharges, insurance payments etc included while performing a transaction.
Tips APIs enable merchants to integrate tipping functionality directly into the payment terminals.

logs.title: New API added under Orders API

new.description: Added **Fetch Order Adjustments** in **Orders API**.
Fetch all adjustments created under an order.

logs.title: New parameters added in Fetch Terminal by ID.

updates.description: Added `lastAliveAt` , `isCharging` , `batteryPercentage` , `powerSource` , `deviceNetwork` , `turnOnTime` to response parameters of the **Fetch Terminal by ID**.

logs.title: New Parameters added in Transaction APIs.

updates.description: Added `issuerCountry` , `interchangeDomain` , `cardCategory` , `cardUsage` to response parameters of the **Fetch One Transaction** , **Fetch All Transactions** , **Fetch Transactions by ID**.

logs.title: New Parameters added in Stores APIs.

updates.description: New response parameters added under **Create Store** , **Update Store Details** , **Fetch Store Details** , **Fetch Stores** to setup online payments.
`merchantWebShopUrl` is the web-shop URL of the merchant.
`paymentPageHostURL`  is the URL of the payment page.
`termsAndConditionsURL` is the URL of the T&C of the merchant’s web-shop, it has to contain the refund policy.
`privacyPolicyURL` is the URL of the privacy policy of the merchant.

logs.title: New Parameters added in Order APIs.

updates.description: Added `includeAdjustments` , `delayCapture` , `enforceTokenization` , `enforce3DSecure` , `lockToPaymentMethod` , `callBackUrl` , `throwErrorIfTerminalInactiveFor` , `paymentPageValidFor` response parameters to **Create New Order** and **Update Order**.

new.description: Added support for operator selection on the terminal.

updates.description: Ensures transaction goes to success/failure on certain Network disconnect edge cases.
Wifi Symbol is shown even if signal strength is very weak.

new.description: Added the functionality to change tips config using APIs.

updates.description: Removed cancelling of transaction in the tips screen which lead to a race condition, instead provided cancelling of the tip.

fixed.description: Code optimization to ensure data flow and data sync with backend.

new.description: New **Activate Terminal** API for merchant added under Merchant API's.
New **Branding API's** added to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard.
New **Printing API** added under Transaction API's.

logs.title: New parameters added in Fetch all Transactions.

new.description: Added  `referenceId` , `truncatedPan` , `cardLabel` , `posEntryMode` , `issuerApplication` , `terminalVerificationCode` , `aid` , `customerResponseCode` , `cvmMethod` , `authMode` , `cardBrand` response parameters to **Fetch All Transactions**.

updates.description: Added new `orderLineLevelCalculation` param under **Create New Order** and **Update Order** APIs
This boolean value when set to true, enables support for row level campaign and shipping calculations.

logs.title: New API in Transactions and Terminals API.

new.description: Added **Transaction Search** in **Transactions API**.
Added **Get Interapp Code** in **Terminals API**.
Introduced new terminal type softpos under **Fetch All Merchant Terminals** , **Fetch All Store Terminals** , **Fetch Terminal by ID**.
Added new **Capture Payment** , **Check Capture Status** , **Complete Payment** in Payment APIs.

updates.description: Included additional details about the transaction in **Transaction Search API** .
Added **Get Interapp Details** in Terminal APIs.
Added new `unit` , `generateShortLink` , `delayPayout` , ` payButtonType` params under **Create New Order** and **Update Order** APIs

Added new `includeAdjustments` , `delayCapture` , `enforceTokeization` , `enforce3DSecure` , `lockToPaymentMethods` , ` callBackUrl` , ` throwErrorIfTerminalInactiveFor` , `paymentPageValidFor` , `authMode` params under **Create New Order** and **Update Order** APIs
Added **Fetch Online Orders** in Order APIs.
Added **Verify Store Domain** , **Fetch Store Domains** in Stores APIs.

new.description: Added **Fetch Transaction Analytics** in Merchants APIs.

Added Console module to the Documentation site, this will allow you to create api keys and configure webhooks by yourself. To get access to console please signUp and fill up the developer onboarding form.
Added new *NFC Reading APIs* that allow you to scan and read NFC tags associated with an order.
Added new API's to create, update and fetch Charges for Merchants.
Tap to Pay on iPhone accepts physical debit and credit cards, as well as Apple Pay and other digital wallets. No extra hardware needed. It’s easy, private, secure.
Added new Online Terminal related events to the Order Terminal Event Webhook.

updates.description: Added transaction details to the 'order.paymentcompleted' event data.

logs.title: Added transaction details to status check calls

updates.description: Added transaction details in the response of Check Payment Status API and Fetch Order Status API.
Note that the transaction details are only available when the status is 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED'.

new.description: Added new API's to Remove Branding configuration at partner, merchant and store level.

updates.description: Added interAppJWT to the Initiate Payment API to improve inter-app transaction initiation performance
Enhanced webhook payload to include payment details for failed payments
Enhanced webhook payload to include payment details for cancelled payments

new.description: Refined transaction animations for a more seamless user experience.
Optimized tap area detection for improved responsiveness on both SurfTouch and SurfPrint.
You can now cancel payments made with Swish and Klarna using the new cancellation button.
Refreshed UI texts across the cash register for improved clarity.
Unified payment animation screen design across both standalone and attached modes for a consistent experience.
Card brands are now displayed during card payment presentation for better transparency.

updates.description: Addressed localization issues in the "Add Product Category" section.
Fixed the error message display on transaction failure screens when receipt printing is disabled.

new.description: Introduced a revamped Change Payment Method screen for a more intuitive user experience.
Added a PIN verification screen to securely exit the app when lockToPos is enabled.

fixed.description: Included missing localizations to ensure complete multilingual support.
Resolved an issue where the terminal would automatically log out upon reconnecting, if it was deregistered while offline.
